description_long: This house features a brick exterior with a combination of gable and flat roof sections, giving it a modern suburban appearance. The front facade includes a prominent garage with a double door, a covered entryway with steps, and large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light. The rear and side elevations reveal a spacious balcony or terrace area, as well as additional windows and access points. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper level set back in some areas to create visual interest and outdoor living space. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical on the front, with more varied placement on the sides and rear. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and contemporary residential architecture, suitable for a family in an urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story brick house with a gable and flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a covered entryway. The design blends traditional and modern elements with a spacious balcony and varied window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, covered entryway with steps, and large front-facing windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage doors, side windows, and the depth of the house structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large balcony or terrace, additional windows, and a more private facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the setback upper story, side windows, and the rear extension of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, asymmetrical on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, single main door, and a small porch area
